title: Act Like a Lady, Think Like a Man
author: Steve Harvey
subline: What men really think about love, relationships, intimacy, and commitment.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- Two interlocking circles — a Venn of 'LADY' and 'MAN' thinking. The center overlap is RED. Title sits in the bottom 1/3. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1180)" fill="none" stroke-width="2.5">
    <!-- Left circle: LADY -->
    <circle cx="-200" cy="0" r="360" stroke="#cccccc"/>
    <text x="-400" y="-380" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.3em">LADY</text>
    <!-- Right circle: MAN -->
    <circle cx="200" cy="0" r="360" stroke="#cccccc"/>
    <text x="400" y="-380" text-anchor="end" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.3em">MAN</text>
    <!-- The overlap region: drawn in red, no fill, slightly thicker -->
    <path d="M 0 -349.4 A 360 360 0 0 1 0 349.4" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <path d="M 0 -349.4 A 360 360 0 0 0 0 349.4" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <!-- A red dot at the center of the overlap -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="12" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Labels in each region -->
    <text x="-300" y="0" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.2em">FEEL</text>
    <text x="300" y="0" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.2em">ACT</text>
    <text x="0" y="0" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.2em">BOTH</text>
    <text x="0" y="500" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.4em">THE SWEET SPOT</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: The book's premise: men and women operate differently, but the overlap is where successful relationships happen. Two interlocking circles — 'LADY' left, 'MAN' right — drawn in graphite 2.5px. The lens-shaped overlap is RED 3px, with a red dot at center labeled 'BOTH'. Labels: left-only 'FEEL', right-only 'ACT'. The cover is literally a Venn diagram of the title. Title sits in the bottom 1/3, weight 500 command, UPPERCASE (Harvey is a command voice). Brand '♀ × ♂' in the top-left; pill '90 DAYS' at the top — the rule Harvey set for knowing someone's true intentions.
